text: RCEW Address and Contact Information. Rajasthan College of Engineering for Women RCEW is located at VMGR+VR, Ajmer Road, Bhakrota, Jaipur, Rajasthan 302026. Main Phone Number: 9001099930. Admission Contact Number: 9001099958. Training and Placement Contact: Ms. Neeti Bohra, Phone 9001880055, Email [email protected]. General Email: [email protected]. Website: www.rcew.ac.in. The college is on Ajmer Road Bhakrota area of Jaipur Rajasthan India. Pin code is 302026.

RCEW full form is Rajasthan College of Engineering for Women. It is a women only engineering college located at Ajmer Road Bhakrota Jaipur Rajasthan 302026. RCEW is affiliated to RTU which is Rajasthan Technical University Kota. The college is NAAC accredited and ISO certified. RCEW was established to empower women in technical education. Chairperson of RCEW is Mrs Beena Singh. Director of RCEW is Dr Arihant Khicha. The college has more than 1200 students and a 1200 plus bed hostel.

RCEW Complete Fee Structure 2025-26. BTech tuition fee is Rs 87498 per year. MBA fee is Rs 68708 per year. MCA fee is Rs 68708 per year. MTech fee is Rs 87498 per year. Caution Money is Rs 7500 one time refundable deposit. CRT Fee is Rs 5000 per year. Uniform Fee is Rs 5000 one time. RTU Development Fee is Rs 2500 per year. Book Bank optional fee is Rs 3000 one time. Hostel double seater room fee is Rs 99900 per year. Hostel single seater room fee is Rs 116000 per year. Hostel security deposit is Rs 3000 one time refundable. Hostel form fee is Rs 1000 one time. Bus fee varies by route between Rs 12000 to Rs 22000 per year.

RCEW Placement and Training Department. Training and Placement Officer is Ms Neeti Bohra. Placement contact number is 9001880055. Placement email is [email protected]. Companies that have recruited from RCEW include Microsoft, IBM, Infosys, Nokia, SAP, UBS, VISA, UKG, Atlas Copco, Verizon, Atlassian, Igalia, AB InBev, Goldman Sachs, Comviva, Philips, Bosch, John Deere, Aecom, HPE, Mahindra, Ericsson, Capgemini, Directi, Accenture, Amazon, TCS, Amdocs, Cognizant, State Street, PlanetSpark, Incture, HSBC, SAPLABS, MathCo, Coforge, UKG, Verizon, Atlas Copco.

RCEW Quick Facts. Full name is Rajasthan College of Engineering for Women. Short name is RCEW. Located at VMGR+VR Ajmer Road Bhakrota Jaipur Rajasthan 302026. Main contact number is 9001099930. Admission contact number is 9001099958. Placement contact number is 9001880055. Website is www.rcew.ac.in. Women only engineering college. Affiliated to Rajasthan Technical University RTU Kota. BTech programs offered are CSE, ECE, Electrical Engineering EE, Civil Engineering, CSE with AI, AIDS which is Artificial Intelligence and Data Science. Postgraduate programs are MTech, MCA, MBA. PhD research programs also available. Hostel capacity is 1200 plus beds. Admission through REAP Rajasthan Engineering Admission Process and Management Quota. Chairperson Mrs Beena Singh. Director Dr Arihant Khicha.

RCEW Departments and Programs. Undergraduate BTech departments are Computer Science Engineering CSE, Electronics and Communication Engineering ECE, Electrical Engineering EE, Civil Engineering, CSE with Artificial Intelligence CSE-AI, Artificial Intelligence and Data Science AIDS, Applied Science. Postgraduate programs are MTech in Computer Science Engineering, MCA Master of Computer Applications, MBA Master of Business Administration. Research programs include PhD. Each department has well equipped laboratories, experienced faculty, and strong industry connections for placements and internships.

RCEW Admission Process. Admission to BTech at RCEW is through REAP which is Rajasthan Engineering Admission Process conducted by CEG Board Jaipur. Management Quota seats are also available directly through college. Eligibility for BTech first year is passing 10+2 with Physics Mathematics Chemistry or related subjects with minimum 45 percent marks. Reserved category candidates need minimum 40 percent marks. Lateral entry to second year BTech is available for diploma holders with minimum 45 percent marks. For admission queries contact 9001099958 or visit www.rcew.ac.in. Documents required are 10th marksheet, 12th marksheet, REAP allotment letter, category certificate if applicable, passport photos, Aadhar card.

RCEW Hostel Information. RCEW has a 1200 plus bed fully functional hostel on campus at Ajmer Road Bhakrota Jaipur. Hostel is centrally air cooled with air conditioned rooms. Facilities include 24x7 medical facility, 24x7 security with CCTV surveillance, 24x7 ambulance service, GYM and indoor games, integrated mess with hygienic food, laundry facility, solar power and rainwater harvesting. OTP based permission system for student safety. Hostel fee for double seater room is Rs 99900 per year. Hostel fee for single seater room is Rs 116000 per year. Security deposit is Rs 3000 refundable. Hostel form fee is Rs 1000 one time. For hostel queries contact 9001099930.
RCEW CHIEF. Director- Dr Arihant Khicha. Chairperson- Mr Faujdaar Singh. Chairwoman- Mrs Beena Singh. For general inquiries
